title: 'No space left on device' but df shows space free
description_md:
The `ingest` worker writes small message files into `/var/spool/ingest`. It's suddenly failing with `No space left on device` — but `df -h` on that filesystem shows plenty of free space, so the on-call before you is baffled. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), figure out the *real* resource that's exhausted, and clear it so new files can be created again.

You're done when a new file can be created in `/var/spool/ingest`.
